sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10770" key="a)ntorqia/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντορθιάζω</orth>, <sense id="n10770.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rise up in opposition,</tr_> Hierocl.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.17A.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
